content: I, Priya Sharma, work as an office assistant in the same building as Mr. Ramesh Kumar. On 12.10.2023, around 3:15 PM, I was standing near the entrance of the GMC office, waiting for my lunch break. I saw Mr. Ramesh Kumar step out of his cabin and walk towards the main gate. He met a man in a light blue shirt who was standing near the parked auto-rickshaw. They exchanged a small envelope. Mr. Kumar then returned to his cabin. A few minutes later, Mr. Arjun Mehta entered the office and met Mr. Kumar. I did not see the envelope being handed over inside — I only saw the earlier exchange outside. I thought it was strange because Mr. Kumar usually handles such matters alone. I told the ACB officers about this because I felt something was off. I swear this is the truth. I did not know the man in blue — I’ve never seen him before.
